message:
chore(beads): mark flywheel_connectors-8714g closed (ratelimit_headers fuzz landed)

Updates flywheel_connectors-8714g (fcp-ratelimit/headers.rs missing fuzz
target for HTTP rate-limit header parser) to reflect the harness having
landed in commit ad786622.

Single line replaced (status=closed + close_reason); no source changes.
Captured separately from the implementation commit so the audit ledger
stays clean.
